title: Add complete notification system
description: Add a full notification system across 4 directories: data model at src/models/notification.ts, business logic service at src/services/notificationService.ts with typed dependency interface, REST API route handlers at src/routes/notifications.ts using Express middleware chain, and shared helpers at src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts, all with co-located unit tests following existing project patterns.

existing_patterns.description: Result<T,E> discriminated union type for explicit error handling — NotificationService should return Result types
Service layer pattern with typed dependency interface (e.g., GradebookServiceDeps) — NotificationService should follow same pattern
Express-style route handlers with middleware chain (auth HOC via withAuth.ts, rate-limiter.ts) — notification routes should reuse withAuth and Result response pattern
Single-function utility files with co-located .test.ts — notificationHelpers should be pure functions with tests
Chainable Express middleware pattern — routes should integrate with existing middleware chain
